description: The Alfieri clan was a Camorra syndicate operating in the northeastern suburbs of Naples, specifically in the Saviano and Nola areas, with its stronghold in Piazzolla di Nola. Founded in 1953 by brothers Salvatore and Carmine Alfieri after their father's murder, it became part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation in the late 1970s to oppose Raffaele Cutolo's NCO. The clan played a key role in the war against the NCO, leading to Cutolo's defeat. Carmine Alfieri, known as 'o ntufato, led the clan after Salvatore's assassination in 1981.
